hero.name: ANTONIO RODRIGUEZ
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer & Cloud Architect
hero.description: Specialized in Python backend, AWS serverless architecture, and process automation reducing operational times by up to 85%.

highlights: Monitoring system from scratch (70% reduction in detection time).
Real-time telemetry (AWS Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Go). Full traceability of processes in real-time.
25 concurrent requests per Lambda with auto-scaling.
Odoo CRM migrations (v14 to v16) with zero downtime.
Cloud architecture on AWS (ECS, EKS, S3, EFS).

skills.items: Python, JavaScript, Go, Flask, Express, Node.js
AWS Lambda, AWS ECS, AWS EKS, AWS S3, AWS API Gateway, AWS EC2, AWS RDS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, GitHub Actions
Git, SAM, Bash, Vim, Claude Code

projects.title: DerLinks
projects.what_it_does: Full-stack CRUD application for link management with a complete authentication system.
projects.how_it_works: Implements secure password hashing, advanced session management with cookies, and strict CORS configuration. The frontend uses React and Vite for a fast interactive UI, communicating with the backend via Axios.
projects.infrastructure: Distributed deployment using Vercel for frontend and Railway for backend, both with SSL certificates secured.

packages.title: dkmio
packages.short_desc: Efficient OKM (Object-Key Mapping) for AWS DynamoDB in Python.
packages.what_it_does: Allows defining DynamoDB tables with minimal keys and indexes, offering a fluent API that handles expression building, attribute escaping, pagination, and error mapping automatically. Supports queries, scans, batch operations, ACID transactions, conditional writes, and TTL.
packages.how_it_works: Uses classes like DynamoDB, PK, SK, Index, LSI, TTL to define models. The fluent API allows chaining methods like .query().where().filter().select(). Operations auto-execute when iterating, accessing by index, or using len/bool. Includes intelligent index projection validation and retries with exponential backoff.

ui.desc_projects: Cloud architectures, full-stack builds, and robust APIs.
ui.desc_packages: Open-source tools published for the community.
